originalTitle: Iowa primary elections: Josh Turek to face Ashley Hinson for US Senate seat
summary: Democratic state house representative beats Zach Wahls and will face off against Trump-backed Republican Hinson
content: Iowa voters nominated candidates in primary elections held on Tuesday, setting the stage for months of fervent campaigning ahead of the November midterms in which the state may play a significant role in deciding the balance of power in Congress. A red state that the GOP has dominated for the past decade, Democrats believe they can be competitive in three of its four House races, its Senate election, and the contest to replace Kim Reynolds, the retiring Republican governor. Here’s who came out ahead in the primary, according to results verified by the Associated Press: US Senate The race to replace retiring Republican senator Joni Ernst saw two Democrats face off in a primary that became a proxy for which direction to take their party following the desultory 2024 election. According to the AP, the winner was Josh Turek, the state house representative who benefited from millions of dollars in outside spending and had the endorsement of a slew of top Democrats. He defeated Zach Wahls, the state senator who pitched himself to voters as an outsider who would stand up to party elites including Chuck Schumer, the US Senate minority leader whom he blamed for weakening the party. The primary between the two men became contentious, as Wahls alleged that his opponent was the favorite of the Democratic establishment, pointing to more than $5m in spending to promote Turek by VoteVets, a Pac that has previously received money from Schumer’s campaign fund. Turek countered that he was the more electable candidate since he had won office in a western Iowa district that leaned conservative, while Wahls represented a liberal area in eastern Iowa. Turek will face Ashley Hinson, a Republican US representative who Donald Trump endorsed to replace Ernst. This story will be updated as more races are called …
chineseTitle: 爱荷华州初选：乔什·图雷克 (Josh Turek) 将与阿什利·辛森 (Ashley Hinson) 争夺美国参议院席位
chineseSummary: 民主党州众议院代表击败扎克·瓦尔斯，并将与特朗普支持的共和党人辛森对决
chineseContent: 爱荷华州选民在周二举行的初选中提名了候选人，为 11 月中期选举前数月的激烈竞选奠定了基础，该州可能在决定国会权力平衡方面发挥重要作用。过去十年来，共和党在这个红色州占据主导地位，民主党人相信他们可以在四场众议院竞选中的三场、参议院选举以及取代即将退休的共和党州长金·雷诺兹(Kim Reynolds)的竞争中具有竞争力。根据美联社核实的结果，以下是在初选中领先的人： 美国参议院 在接替即将退休的共和党参议员乔尼·恩斯特 (Joni Ernst) 的竞选中，两名民主党人在初选中展开对峙，这场初选成为了 2024 年选举断断续续后各党派走向的代表。据美联社报道，获胜者是州众议院代表乔什·图雷克(Josh Turek)，他从数百万美元的外部支出中受益，并得到了许多民主党高层的支持。他击败了州参议员扎克·瓦尔斯(Zach Wahls)，后者向选民推销自己为局外人，愿意与党内精英对抗，其中包括美国参议院少数党领袖查克·舒默(Chuck Schumer)，他指责舒默削弱了该党。两人之间的初选引起了争议，瓦尔斯声称他的对手是民主党建制派最喜欢的人，并指出 VoteVets 花费了超过 500 万美元来宣传图雷克，而 VoteVets 是一个政治行动委员会，此前曾从舒默的竞选基金中获得过资金。图雷克反驳说，他是更容易当选的候选人，因为他在爱荷华州西部一个倾向保守的地区赢得了职位，而瓦尔斯代表了爱荷华州东部的一个自由派地区。图雷克将对阵美国共和党代表阿什利·辛森(Ashley Hinson)，唐纳德·特朗普支持他接替恩斯特。这个故事将随着更多的情况而更新
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
